title: Petoline's Victorian Wallpapers
body:
Hey! 🧛


This mini Resourcepack replaces all of Minecraft’s glazed terracotta blocks with Gothic & Victorian-style
wallpaper textures 🕯️

Perfect for haunted mansions, hotels, or just adding a dark romantic flair to your world.

Plz send me some pics of what u created with it : Discord : Peto@5912


∼ No need to unzip the Resourcepack! Simply drop it in your folder and enjoy. That’s it! ∼

🕰️🧛🕰️


You can find bonus textures in the pack with the name 'bonus'.
